Our Portfolio

Our companies are creating the next generation of clean, safe, reliable and cost effective energy for communities and business across the world. They are solving for the energy demand necessary for the world to thrive.

By investing in category-defining leaders, we bring the latest innovations and technological advancement to future-proof the natural gas value chain and meet the needs of the energy expansion.

Fund I

Fund II

Together we can meet the energy demands for a prosperous and secure future.
